name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Peter, we didn't get your response on our pre-convention focus group
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
With only a little over a month to go before the convention, it's critical that we have as much feedback as possible from our top supporters. |
---
Peter,

Last week, we closed off responses on our pre-Democratic National Convention focus group, **but we didn't get your response the last time we reached out.**

With only a little over a month to go before the convention, it's critical that we have as much feedback as possible from our top supporters. So, we're extending our focus group invite just this once to give you another chance to share your thoughts with us.

[Will you take action to support Joe Biden today? Your feedback is essential to locking down our winning strategy, and we need less than two minutes of your time today >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c41a1/1098260267/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B3_conventionextended_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B3_conventionextended_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full") | **Biden for President
Pre-Convention Focus Group Invite #4012679**

**Name:** Peter Willis
**Focus group response:** Missing
**Deadline to respond:** 7/15/20 @ 11:59 PM

[ENTER FOCUS GROUP NOW >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c41a1/1098260267/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B3_conventionextended_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B3_conventionextended_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full")
---
We know you get a ton of emails every day, so we completely understand if you missed our previous invitations to be a part of this exclusive focus group.

But this is your campaign, Peter, and we hope this deadline extension allows you to make your voice heard today.

We know we ask for your feedback a lot, but these surveys really do help us ensure that your values and priorities are reflected in our campaign strategy -- and we wouldn't have it any other way.

[So if you have a couple of minutes to spare, we hope you'll take this last opportunity to enter our Pre-Convention Focus Group. It will be a huge help in crafting our strategy for bringing more folks on to Team Joe >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c41a1/1098260267/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B3_conventionextended_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B3_conventionextended_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full")

Thanks,

JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c41a0/1098260267/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c419f/1098260267/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c419e/1098260267/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c419d/1098260267/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c419c/1098260267/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c419b/1098260267/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c419a/1098260267/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c4199/1098260267/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c4198/1098260267/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c4197/1098260267/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c419a/1098260267/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c4196/1098260267/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c4199/1098260267/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfc7/1cd0ac28/8c54f120/357c4195/1098260267/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Celebrating A Year Of #TeamHagerty, Start To Early Voting
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-tl/) July 14, 2020 **A Year Of #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-r/) Sunday was the anniversary of President Trump announcing and endorsing Bill's campaign for U.S. Senate. Over the last year, #TeamHagerty has been blessed to travel all across our state and meet with Tennesseans. Team Hagerty's momentum continues to grow stronger every day, and with early voting beginning on Friday, we're not taking anything for granted. Tennesseans know that Bill is the only candidate who has worked closely with President Trump for years now, and we trust Bill to stand with the President to fight for the America we love. Read more about this anniversary **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **Early Voting Begins Friday** This Friday, July 17, marks the beginning of the early voting period for the Tennessee Senate Republican Primary! Early voting ends Saturday, August 1, and election day is Thursday, August 6. #TeamHagerty has strong support across the state and our momentum continues to build every single day. Make sure you get out to the polls and support Bill for U.S. Senate. You can find your polling location **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-j/)** **LISTEN: Phil Valentine Applauds Hagerty For Severing Ties With Company** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-t/) Phil Valentine of SuperTalk 99.7 WWTN in Nashville spoke about Bill severing ties with a company, saying, "I applaud Bill Hagerty for distancing himself, severing ties with any company that has anything to do with these left-wing Marxists..."Listen to the clip [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-i/) **ICYMI: Bill's Statement On Getting Back To School** Last week, Metro Nashville Public Schools announced that the start of the 2020-2021 school year would be through remote learning. In response, Bill released a statement calling for families who depend on schools for healthy meals, for a safe environment and for a great education to go back to the classroom this Fall. So often the American dream is laid with a good education. That's why Bill strongly believes it's not when we get our children back in school - it's how. He agrees with President Trump, it's imperative that we open our schools safely this fall. Read Bill's full statement [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-d/) **Rep. Andy Holt Is #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-h/) Rep. Andy Holt from Weakley County joined President Trump, government officials, business leaders, law enforcement officers and community leaders in endorsing Bill Hagerty's campaign for U.S. Senate. We are so proud to have so many local leaders across the state supporting Team Hagerty. You can read the release announcing over 1,000 local leaders who support Bill [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-k/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-u/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-m/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-c/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-q/) **William Lamberth Commentary: We Need Bill Hagerty Representing Us In The U.S. Senate[**WRCB:**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-a/) Rep. Fleischmann, U.S. Senate candidate Bill Hagerty visit Signal Mountain on July 4th[**TN Star:**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-f/) Bill Hagerty Says No to COVID-19 Mask Mandate During Signal Mountain Stop**[Shelbyville Times-Gazette:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-z/) **Letter to the Editor: The conservative choice: Bill Hagerty**[WJHL:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-v/) **Hagerty brings GOP Senate campaign to Johnson City**[Williamson Homepage:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-e/) **Senate candidate Bill Hagerty holds double-digit lead over Republican opponents, survey finds
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-w/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-jl/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-jr/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-jy/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-jj/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-ji/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-jd/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-jh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-jk/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[ Share ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-fb-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-tr/)
[ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-tw-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-ty/)
[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-pikiyjd-l-tj)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-pikiyjd-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-tt) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-pikiyjd-fuutjhhtj-ti/)

name: MJ Hegar
subject: We did it, y'all! Now let's win this November!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's time to defeat Sen. Cornyn -- are you with me?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890103/7f51f7bc/41eed253/4ef66753/1474102697/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890103/7f51f7bc/41eed253/4ef66752/1474102697/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200715.1nd__1717__&amount=10")
---
It's official, y'all! We just won the runoff, and now it's time to flip Texas AND the Senate!

Today, I am so proud to accept the Democratic nomination to be the U.S. Senate candidate for Texas. It wouldn't be possible without this powerful grassroots team -- without people like you who look at our current representation in Washington and say _hell no_! So, as part of this team, you're accepting this nomination right along with me!

**We 've built a strong team, and we're ready to do something incredible in November: flip Texas. [Are you with us?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890103/7f51f7bc/41eed253/4ef66752/1474102697/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200715.1nd__1717__&amount=10")**

Together, we've raised over $6.5 million from more than 56,000 donors, with donations from over 190 counties in Texas. We have hundreds of volunteers reaching out to their neighbors and communities all across Texas. This team is ready for the hard work ahead.

And there's no doubt about it -- this race will be tough, y'all! But not just for us: _Roll Call_ ranked Sen. Cornyn as one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators! That's why he's amassed millions of dollars with the help of big money donors like the NRA, Big Pharma, the insurance industry, and the private detention industry. He's got the Koch network, Mitch McConnell, and all their Washington allies swooping in to his aid.

**But they don 't scare me.**

I've taken on tough fights my whole life. Like when I was shot down and fought back against the Taliban, when I took on the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women, and when I fought for my life during childbirth. Together, this team WILL win this one.

**[Will you make a donation so we can hit the ground running and take the fight to Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890103/7f51f7bc/41eed253/4ef66752/1474102697/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200715.1nd__1717__&amount=10")**

We HAVE to win this fight. If we flip Texas, we _will_ flip the Senate!

And if we want to fight climate change, end the gun violence epidemic, expand health care to all Texans, march toward racial justice, pass immigration reform, defend reproductive rights, and respond to the health and economic impacts of COVID-19 -- plus so much more -- we can't afford to lose.

Let's celebrate tonight -- we've come a long way and fought a good fight. But we've gotta get right back to work, because it's going to take all of us working like hell to beat an 18-year incumbent senator who's sold out Texans' health, safety, and security to special interests, political bosses, and corporate PAC donors.

We CAN win in November, but it's going to take all of us to do it.
\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890103/7f51f7bc/41eed253/4ef66752/1474102697/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200715.1nd__1717__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890103/7f51f7bc/41eed253/4ef66751/1474102697/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1717&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890103/7f51f7bc/41eed253/4ef66750/1474102697/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: On To November!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18259960/222703127/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUyMDVlNy05M2M2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nd4DukF2jOS3SY_WrlPX2VjuZOIYfIy2dcGI6O0_0l4=&emci=da4e5a3d-86c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=335205e7-93c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10438639) _Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. [**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18259961/222703128/1282771135?refcode=07152020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUyMDVlNy05M2M2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nd4DukF2jOS3SY_WrlPX2VjuZOIYfIy2dcGI6O0_0l4=)_
* * *
---
Dear Friend, I am both proud and humbled that the Democratic voters of Central Texas have again nominated me to be their candidate for the office of Representative here in the 17th district. It has taken almost three years, but we've built a team ready and able to take on Pete Sessions in November. **[Are you with us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18259962/222703129/-1907457920?refcode=07152020_line0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUyMDVlNy05M2M2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nd4DukF2jOS3SY_WrlPX2VjuZOIYfIy2dcGI6O0_0l4=)** Over the last 25 years, Congress has been taken over by ideologues uninterested in governance and opportunists interested only in self-advancement. It has abandoned many of its Constitutional duties. This deeply divided and dysfunctional Congress doesn't serve the people of Central Texas, and it does not serve the people of the United States. Pete Sessions was in Congress for 22 of those 25 years. In 2018 the voters in Dallas fired him. Now he's trying to sneak back in by taking our seat. I won't stand for it and you shouldn't either. This is going to be a tough fight. He's already raised hundreds of thousands of dollars from PACs. If we want to expand access to health care to all Texans, reform our criminal justice and immigration systems, and start to deal with climate change, all issues that he let fester for over two decades, we have to beat Pete. To do that, I need your help. _**[Demand Better. clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. = Dear Friend, I am both proud and humbled that the Democratic voters of Central Texas have again nominated me to be their candidate for the office of Representative here in the 17th district. It has taken almost three years, but we've built a team ready and able to take on Pete Sessions in November. = Over the last 25 years, Congress has been taken over by ideologues uninterested in governance and opportunists interested only in self-advancement. It has abandoned many of its Constitutional duties. This deeply divided and dysfunctional Congress doesn't serve the people of Central Texas, and it does not serve the people of the United States. Pete Sessions was in Congress for 22 of those 25 years. In 2018 the voters in Dallas fired him. Now he's trying to sneak back in by taking our seat. I won't stand for it and you shouldn't either. This is going to be a tough fight. He's already raised hundreds of thousands of dollars from PACs. If we want to expand access to health care to all Texans, reform our criminal justice and immigration systems, and start to deal with climate change, all issues that he let fester for over two decades, we have to beat Pete. To do that, I need your help. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | =** Thank you, and stay safe. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: SPECIAL: How We Rebuild
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I want to give you the first look at today's press conference, where I'll be talking about the future of Rhode Island and how we can create a more equitable and resilient state. Below is the introduction to my vision for not just recovering from this crisis, but coming back stronger.
The full vision can be read [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bthfxafYh3dKrJFGoEBTDlkzdiZXWvheqJ_UpWb87FQu_N5vzBkYJlj2VecZ7q4e59thDlwsZE0kJs3ycF3SfJpxCfBm80TEhu9wq-Fu2dX1qk4g6Y4JuZaEJkdsj3xhQ1a4rRJ33tDqeQ1q-8GS_yKaWvKwogdPXJjZL9FTLKlv2a047IqEobLXBbFo9SGaa2ouHQVhSKQW7RWnwt0yG_F6EjXwVRkGDEyYHzLqkttIa0eHaHM9SA==&c=q4CkyKtljust0zZZmHXkKB13Fzla6XEykF_AFKzJM-Qopu07Lu-5WQ==&ch=An81dejYFuqDGvQrMahyQSZ1uNUZyK27GTJrHBV6KqqdIEmmUhfNgA==).
---
| There's a lot of talk these days about the "new normal." You hear it all over the country. What do schools look like in the "new normal?" How do businesses succeed under the "new normal?" That phrase suggests a return to the status quo -- a desire to get back to the way things used to be before COVID-19.
I see two big problems with that way of thinking. First, the economy is undergoing changes that will mean the way we live and work will be different in a post-COVID era than it was before. We need to be ready for that. And second, the economy under the "old normal" left a lot of people behind: people without a degree or credential past college who struggled to find work in a quickly-changing economy; people who worked full-time jobs and still worried about how they were going to put food on the table; and people of color, who for too long have been held back by systemic racism in institutions like health care, housing, and education. These underlying disparities in our society have existed for too long, and they were put on full display when COVID-19 hit.
Before COVID-19, Rhode Island was in the midst of an unparalleled economic comeback. We were creating good jobs, and Rhode Islanders were filling those jobs. Our unemployment rate had gone from the highest in the nation to the lowest in a generation. In the last six years, we set a new record for the most jobs ever in Rhode Island, and then we broke our own record, 14 times. During that period, we were setting records in the number of new businesses starting, in commercial real estate investments, in college graduation rates, in the number of Rhode Islanders with health insurance, and more. Then, in the blink of an eye, that progress came to a halt.
There's no question that every American has struggled with the impacts of this crisis. But those who were hit hardest are those who could least afford it. And we have both an economic and moral imperative to rebuild our state in a way that allows every one of us -- regardless of income or background -- to RIse Together.
---
|
---
| I'll be on TV at 1 p.m. this afternoon to tell you about our plan to rebuild a stronger Rhode Island. I hope you'll join me then.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bthfxafYh3dKrJFGoEBTDlkzdiZXWvheqJ_UpWb87FQu_N5vzBkYJlj2VecZ7q4eSf7FAKKSg_LjoHXpkyvAjmVmON8bQde-2ir7ua478E7CJTF40d6Ctq_51ecWjH6dHlBPpI_mASNAFlnmtcgwSCOq2d3ZrFZvvbm7I4fmDi2jpTr3ofr11IQrA0RJQEEW8xCEqO-yLJ2xzBkpQwL4AyP8i5h98eDgh2pZTBQ-H6DfUaSgYlC9vSqP2pv6FYe6m_u_H-yGcLfrMZ9KB_eWYF2vjYrAkTE4KfEMFA7MdY8brZwII2oFLaWG8cXVRq-_Q97lm4l-dJNwwMmXA_FCEQTnghUMqkW6qzTzxMIptuJk7m_Ot2yiQ_aZNOEGI8Drg14djRwmPgesHChbUiFLK8ryQeygP8Zy7FDFwdLagCU4cTpMNfO6Rch0RKW7hCi1&c=q4CkyKtljust0zZZmHXkKB13Fzla6XEykF_AFKzJM-Qopu07Lu-5WQ==&ch=An81dejYFuqDGvQrMahyQSZ1uNUZyK27GTJrHBV6KqqdIEmmUhfNgA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903

During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
I had to come to you directly, team.

We are still **$1,532** short of where we need to be at this point in the month to keep pace with our July fundraising goal. We know that special interests are willing to spend whatever it takes to win this race, so it’s crucial that we’re sticking to our budget and not missing any of our important fundraising goals.

**Anything you can pitch in to help us close this fundraising gap before _midnight tonight_ would be deeply appreciated:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeq32020?refcode=July**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18263529/222757998/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.15_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=48def376-a6c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGRlZjM3Ni1hNmM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tws9lpoVrU0DKCzEFx5DYyFOHHxc_tpd9FkRRrzE8pk=)

Friend, it’s no secret that Washington is broken. Politicians like Scott Perry have lost touch with what it means to be a public servant. It’s not about playing partisan games or scoring headlines. It’s about delivering real results for our community.

**That’s what I’ve done every day as Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, and it’s what I will continue to do on behalf of the people of PA-10 in Congress** by fighting to ensure access to affordable health care, lower prescription drug costs, and build an economy that works for everyone.

**[But I need you on my side to get it done, friend. If you’re with me, and you believe that we need real leadership in Washington, join us by chipping in $5 or more now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18263530/222757999/462758527?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2020.07.15_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=48def376-a6c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGRlZjM3Ni1hNmM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tws9lpoVrU0DKCzEFx5DYyFOHHxc_tpd9FkRRrzE8pk=) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18263531/222758000/462758527?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2020.07.15_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=48def376-a6c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGRlZjM3Ni1hNmM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tws9lpoVrU0DKCzEFx5DYyFOHHxc_tpd9FkRRrzE8pk=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18263532/222758001/462758527?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2020.07.15_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=48def376-a6c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGRlZjM3Ni1hNmM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tws9lpoVrU0DKCzEFx5DYyFOHHxc_tpd9FkRRrzE8pk=)

name: Mary Mancini
subject: it's time to raise our voice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
I want to introduce you to our 2020 Amplify Democrats program, and ask for your help funding it.
July and August are traditionally the hardest months to raise money in politics. With everything a stake in this election we have to not only meet but exceed expectations. And that’s why we’ve created the Amplify Democrats program. It’s a program designed to uplift and support the voices of Democrats and Democratic candidates in our communities, and promote local platforms and policies that will make positive change for Tennesseans.
Whether it’s expanding health coverage or defending women’s rights, Tennessee Democrats are out there fighting for a better future for ALL of us. Covering costs for voter outreach and candidate recruitment and training is critical to amplify these issues. We are trying to raise $25,000 in the next two months. Will you help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wik4p5beajbboYHdVafHZMbIFjrBG7qsN88KW2YPaTAQxqeGalxXkHobndUvibscuBnBT5BJuKkXFjy16-JXIXhd0TNG9Nua1RmRnNOkwRm-hkD5pxYEjspeWVX2oqYlHB4-Jd5dLEAwXYFhdigJTEnApuFT9MpJPtNdbUkU5cs=&c=Uh2B32Zu3TylUrLYjfmGdQmM75-w2ny82XvC7vxHxBgM5QVlstIB8w==&ch=9wIVoy3CYgXuD3uKRjvqlv3qMlT2y__S8j5vu5fZTqn_yHaBzPUBYw==)
---
| Patriot,
The NFL has done it again. They announced that they will play the "Black national anthem" before games this fall. Once more, the NFL is bowing down to the "woke" mob and throwing their entire support behind BLM and their views that our country is full of racists.
The NFL, along with the elite left-wing class, think they are morally superior to the rest of the country and that they need to lecture us on what's acceptable.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wik4p5beajbboYHdVafHZMbIFjrBG7qsN88KW2YPaTAQxqeGalxXkHobndUvibscuBnBT5BJuKkXFjy16-JXIXhd0TNG9Nua1RmRnNOkwRm-hkD5pxYEjspeWVX2oqYlHB4-Jd5dLEAwXYFhdigJTEnApuFT9MpJPtNdbUkU5cs=&c=Uh2B32Zu3TylUrLYjfmGdQmM75-w2ny82XvC7vxHxBgM5QVlstIB8w==&ch=9wIVoy3CYgXuD3uKRjvqlv3qMlT2y__S8j5vu5fZTqn_yHaBzPUBYw==)
---
| Enough is enough; I will not stand for this divisiveness any longer. WE ARE ONE COUNTRY UNITED UNDER ONE FLAG AND ONE NATIONAL ANTHEM.
Apparently the NFL thinks we should be divided over our race, along with allowing players to kneel before the flag and anthem.
I need you to [sign this petition to tell the NFL to unite under one anthem and respect the American flag.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wik4p5beajbboYHdVafHZMbIFjrBG7qsN88KW2YPaTAQxqeGalxXkHobndUvibscpjH7w9LLn6qAPXcWtHPdFeGuPO9GCq2e6raN4rtSiDQsZeRT4XnQitqIxXQczFwDDz8MaVXUWIJ6MYMP8SHDewPLIfftONBm9Wvw7-ok22r6lHJp_ylQKI-3ScXVtUhz&c=Uh2B32Zu3TylUrLYjfmGdQmM75-w2ny82XvC7vxHxBgM5QVlstIB8w==&ch=9wIVoy3CYgXuD3uKRjvqlv3qMlT2y__S8j5vu5fZTqn_yHaBzPUBYw==) We need to make a statement to the radical leftists that we won't be divided and we'll always love our country.

| | | [SIGN YOUR NAME NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wik4p5beajbboYHdVafHZMbIFjrBG7qsN88KW2YPaTAQxqeGalxXkHobndUvibscpjH7w9LLn6qAPXcWtHPdFeGuPO9GCq2e6raN4rtSiDQsZeRT4XnQitqIxXQczFwDDz8MaVXUWIJ6MYMP8SHDewPLIfftONBm9Wvw7-ok22r6lHJp_ylQKI-3ScXVtUhz&c=Uh2B32Zu3TylUrLYjfmGdQmM75-w2ny82XvC7vxHxBgM5QVlstIB8w==&ch=9wIVoy3CYgXuD3uKRjvqlv3qMlT2y__S8j5vu5fZTqn_yHaBzPUBYw==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Patriot, The NFL has done it again. They announced that they will play the "Black national anthem" before games this fall. Once more, the NFL is bowing down to the "woke" mob and throwing their entire support behind BLM and their views that our country is full of racists. The NFL, along with the elite left-wing class, think they are morally superior to the rest of the country and that they need to lecture us on what's acceptable. | == | Enough is enough; I will not stand for this divisiveness any longer. WE ARE ONE COUNTRY UNITED UNDER ONE FLAG AND ONE NATIONAL ANTHEM. Apparently the NFL thinks we should be divided over our race, along with allowing players to kneel before the flag and anthem. I need you to == We need to make a statement to the radical leftists that we won't be divided and we'll always love our country. | | | == | We have to spread this message far and wide so that we can end this divisiveness and unite. I'll need your help taking on the mob and their hatred of America, which is why == | | | == | Thanks for supporting me. Keep fighting for what is right, | | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2020 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: I won't back down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, It started with bail reform and now it’s led to defunding and abolishing our police. Unlike the socialists, I support the men and women in blue who protect and serve our community everyday.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=212A336A1A4286)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

It started with bail reform and now it’s led to defunding and abolishing our police.

Unlike the socialists, I support the men and women in blue who protect and serve our community everyday.

That is why I stood with our Brooklyn and Staten Island police officers and marched in support of our police, restoring law and order to our community, and to stop socialism- even when other elected officials refused to show up.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=212A336A1A4287)
---
| | |
---
| | Now, the same elected officials and my opponent who refused to show up are criticizing me for supporting the safety of our community.

But I won’t back down and I need you to have my back.

[This November we have a very distinct choice. We can have a No Nonsense leader in Congress who will stand up to the radicals that are defunding the police in our own community and cities across the country or continue down the path of socialism and lawlessness.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=212A336A1A4287)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Your Calls Worked
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_worked&n=1)
---
Peter -- Last night the DFL controlled House finally took up the vote to End Walz Emergency Powers. I wish I could report that they finally came to their senses, but there's still work to do. **The good news is two more Democrats voted with us and against Walz: Representatives Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard.** Do you know how difficult it is to splinter the relationship of a legislator and their governor? Because you were willing to take time out of your schedule to call and email them, you drove a wedge between the Democrats. Now we have **FIVE** more Democrats that need to come our way so we can finally end Walz' Emergency Powers!
## Your calls got these legislators to vote against Walz:
**Rep Dave Lislegard - 651-296-0170 / rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn** **Rep Julie Sandstede - 651-296-0172 / rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn** **Rep Paul Marquart \- 651-296-6829 / rep.paul.marquart@house.mn** **Rep Gene Pelowski \- 651-296-8637 / rep.gene.pelowski@house.mn**
## Here are the Democrats that still need to come our way:
**Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)** **Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Rep Jeanne Poppe - 651-296-4193 /[rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn)** **Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Script** _**:** _ _Rep __________, you keep voting to protect Governor Walz' Emergency Powers over what's best for Minnesota. The antithesis of a Democracy is a government where one person makes unilateral rules. How can you keep supporting these Emergency Powers that take away the Legislature's powers and harm Minnesota business and families?_ We'll keep you informed on when the next vote comes up. The Legislature adjourned until July 20th. Visit **[action4liberty.com](action4liberty.com)** for more news. **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_worked&n=2).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_worked&n=3).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_calls_worked&n=4), software for leaders.

body:
| A Message From Amanda Makki For Congress | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=6ea417d246&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Patriot, Thank you so much for supporting our campaign to defeat Charlie Crist and take back the House in November! We truly could not have done it without you. It is because of your support that a poll conducted last night shows we are leading in the primary! [See for yourself here.](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=1f6acbe5bd&e=ee1c0329b3)

|

| [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=5b74f308ed&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| We are one step closer to having our Conservative Counterpunch in Congress to Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar, and to ending Charlie Crist’s political career but we are not done yet. The primary is one month away and we can't take anything for granted. Will you help us seal the deal and defeat Charlie?
---
| [CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=eac74fb5c1&e=ee1c0329b3 "CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---
| Florida's 13th District was Republican for over 40 years until Charlie came along and with your help, we will make it Republican again! Charlie does not even show up to vote, and does not represent the values of Pinellas. If you support our cause, please support us in any way you can. [Click here to donate.](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=e05b4e7fce&e=ee1c0329b3)

body:

**_THE WASHINGTON POST_ : A DEMOCRATIC WIN IN GEORGIA KEY TO ENDING MCCONNELL'S SENATE MAJORITY**
Friend: Right now, polling shows Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) and unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R) NECK and NECK - in a race that analysts at _The Washington Post_ say is key to deciding Senate control!
That's why Mitch McConnell is lining up the FULL backing of the Republican establishment to support his handpicked candidate, and why Loeffler is flooding this race with $20 MILLION of her own fortune. It's obvious: **The GOP is PANICKING.**
While Loeffler is desperate to buy this seat outright, Reverend Warnock is working to earn the trust and support of everyday Georgians, and he's doing it with a people-powered campaign behind him.
We have a historic opportunity to elect Reverend Warnock as Georgia's first Black senator, flip this seat and end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all - but ONLY if people like you step up and help us build _the strongest grassroots team possible._
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can win in Georgia and take back the Senate, but we can't do it alone. With time running out before our midnight deadline, we're still falling $4,382 short. **

| | Peter – I am so humbled and excited to announce that it’s official: **I’m the Democratic nominee to take on Republican Michael McCaul this fall.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18267802/222830016/1803533031?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200715_WeWon_U1_X1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTExMGM3ZC1iZmM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MfTHwNFFQyxAKhfkVRa5XXPZDLKxlm1s-VaM_TY9bI=) I could not be more honored that the people of Texas’ 10th district have put their faith in me once again. We have built an unstoppable coalition **and I know that together we’ll flip this district and win this race.** _This district is one of the country’s top battlegrounds, and McCaul is sitting on over a million dollars to spend attacking me._ So while we celebrate, we also have to look ahead to the general election this fall. McCaul has a huge head start on fundraising, so it’s time to play catch up. name: Brittni McGuire
subject: can you help the WVDP?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

July and August are not great months for political fundraising historically, but we think this year might be different. Democrats are upset with what’s going on in our country and are raising their voices. In November we may see the most sweeping Democratic victory in our country’s history. The WVDP wants to do our part, but we’re going to need a little help.
We want to ramp up our voter outreach program this month. We want to make sure that every Democrat is registered to vote and knows how to do it safely. We want to win every race we can up and down the ticket.
Will you consider making a donation today if you can afford to? Every little bit helps. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

clean_body: [] Friend, July and August are not great months for political fundraising historically, but we think this year might be different. Democrats are upset with what’s going on in our country and are raising their voices. In November we may see the most sweeping Democratic victory in our country’s history. The WVDP wants to do our part, but we’re going to need a little help. We want to ramp up our voter outreach program this month. We want to make sure that every Democrat is registered to vote and knows how to do it safely. We want to win every race we can up and down the ticket. Will you consider making a donation today if you can afford to? Every little bit helps. [] secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv] Thank you! Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP [] Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible. body:
Tonight we’re facing our first mid-month fundraising goal since we closed the books on the second quarter, and we need just 14 more contributions from 34223 to meet our goal.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18268799/222846134/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGY1MTdlYS1jNWM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1H9FY7vfNf9JTIA959olEUyM9yxGTumWS53_kSuGYg=&emci=30de4e84-43c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=78f517ea-c5c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644) Friends,

Tonight we’re facing our first mid-month fundraising goal since we closed the books on the second quarter, and we need just 14 more contributions from 34223 to meet our goal.

**[Can you make a contribution now to ensure we hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18268800/222846135/1073285021?refcode=em07152020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGY1MTdlYS1jNWM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1H9FY7vfNf9JTIA959olEUyM9yxGTumWS53_kSuGYg=)**

I take the responsibility of flipping this seat very seriously — so many of you have invested in our efforts and so many hardworking Florida families are counting on us to fight for leadership we deserve.

It’s very important to me and to our campaign that we stay on track every month as we get closer and closer to November.

**[I know I’ve been able to count on you before when we were so close to hitting a goal and I hope I can again. Please, make a donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18268801/222846136/1073285021?refcode=em07152020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGY1MTdlYS1jNWM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1H9FY7vfNf9JTIA959olEUyM9yxGTumWS53_kSuGYg=)**

Thank you for your continued support,

Margaret

As you've probably seen, COVID-19 cases are on the rise in many regions across the country, even setting daily records for new cases in some states. But instead of focusing all of his time on our health and safety, Donald Trump is hitting the golf course.

We all know it didn't have to be this way, Peter. The coronavirus is not Donald Trump's fault, but his inept response to it has cost hundreds of thousands of lives and livelihoods.

So as we can see before our very eyes, leadership matters. And Donald Trump proves with every tweet, every press conference, every golf round, and every order he makes that he is unfit to lead, and that his position of power presents a danger to us all.

But, Peter, this November, we each have the power to do our part and defeat Donald Trump, win the battle for the soul of the nation, and put our country back on the road to progress.

We just need to ensure that we have the resources to get out the vote. No matter what the polls say, Donald Trump will not be easy to defeat at the end of the day. He still holds a three-year head start on fundraising, and has already spent tens of millions of dollars to attack Joe Biden in key Electoral College states.

**So today, we 're coming directly to you to help us make sure we have every single resource at our disposal to elect Joe Biden. [We're facing our mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow night, and we still need to raise another 100,000 donations from online supporters like you in order to meet our goal. Can you chip in $5 right now to ensure that we can restore real leadership in America?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.15_B1_leadership_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.15_B1_leadership_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2")**

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" As you've probably seen, COVID-19 cases are on the rise in many regions across the country, even setting daily records for new cases in some states. But instead of focusing all of his time on our health and safety, Donald Trump is hitting the golf course. We all know it didn't have to be this way, Peter. The coronavirus is not Donald Trump's fault, but his inept response to it has cost hundreds of thousands of lives and livelihoods. So as we can see before our very eyes, leadership matters. And Donald Trump proves with every tweet, every press conference, every golf round, and every order he makes that he is unfit to lead, and that his position of power presents a danger to us all. But, Peter, this November, we each have the power to do our part and defeat Donald Trump, win the battle for the soul of the nation, and put our country back on the road to progress. name: Greg Pence
subject: Nancy Pelosi doesn’t care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Our freedoms are under fire - we need to take decisive action to defend them or our freedoms will be torn down just like our statues [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7ea2401a2f0c4a96897d843fa1a005ac&_e=5JtemDpBgmYZu3BDdRMJCnCVxc5Kigqv0Xvv991T-2KrHTv-XWzLSxXUHORYoGsUNlhsGaYJYBQoTlrWMj0fiMv5ZOZa4rJbddyGSfVuOqNIVtXt98RlcpiW74_ms3sajc8N4CvVuGk7Zdt-MEmMQ-OQQdon5Wim8ZTX5RSBcUj7d1LLr-Ve3KeljfBkVQ1LFhA0y1Tpo4P7ZNa20ECX9FbRdqDN3MC3hWyXwKwtvXQPfOLooAMswJ7IolU3TmC7cmPOX5LquXqHgINThV6I6RB9rL9rkOAi-DPRfZTGjhrIJjDuN0LgR7J_O_CrqvHu9ifnxzA0uU2n39HGNedeHicCb9_XY2R4Gl2kex9XFbmBqwk3BaW1lk2lyt1rKvQ3x9Id9A7A8RUwnvyHjW1M3pBt48Ka4E6NW-_ExidDFWk%3D) **“I don’t care that much about statues...people will do what they do.”** **\- Nancy Pelosi, July 9th, 2020** Friend, Once again, political correctness and the Left’s mob mentality are threatening to forever alter America’s history – and that’s fine with Nancy Pelosi. [**TAKE CONGRESS OUT OF NANCY’S HANDS THIS YEAR**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7ea2401a2f0c4a96897d843fa1a005ac&_e=5JtemDpBgmYZu3BDdRMJCnCVxc5Kigqv0Xvv991T-2KrHTv-XWzLSxXUHORYoGsUNlhsGaYJYBQoTlrWMj0fiMv5ZOZa4rJbddyGSfVuOqNIVtXt98RlcpiW74_ms3sajc8N4CvVuGk7Zdt-MEmMQ-OQQdon5Wim8ZTX5RSBcUj7d1LLr-Ve3KeljfBkVQ1LF1jmUvROOreQ900aUgkTc3RvvjhMpmI897xWbGrvT-qDgvFNL6KVFcrx_6o-dtDTznLVtfdUEGXK21QDVvqrf6xCkgtKchDsuFPq21nND-zhnbOdJl_wrJwYZ0CmAQg-5qlK693XSppIiAiaa1jHarlkJHnR0RPTjaA14H7uq7os5Dp2MGCTZFeDvJaFcI5zdDRcEBKcfSjCvP0VdxnQ82maTorMCUIDZsoxkPhYIOA%3D) This is about something bigger than just statues of George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, and our other Founding Fathers.
The freedoms they gave us are under fire – and unless we take decisive action to defend them, those freedoms will be torn down after all their statues are.
**Nancy Pelosi either doesn’t understand that, or she doesn’t care. Either way, it’s time for us to take Congress back from her control this November, and that starts today.**
Friend, we’re just a matter of weeks away from Election Day, and the stakes are getting higher every day.
_**Will you help me save America’s history – and future – against the Left’s political correctness?**_ [**CHIP IN $10 TO TAKE BACK CONGRESS**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7ea2401a2f0c4a96897d843fa1a005ac&_e=5JtemDpBgmYZu3BDdRMJCnCVxc5Kigqv0Xvv991T-2KrHTv-XWzLSxXUHORYoGsUcvRaHKVwIE4lgaXu4tdxCgPeS3mOhxGikZfnD7QsGK2TA671KqvPAYnwkB3LQszVvUm-Z-FXiU8IUUBikgN-yTE5Bpgse-SAsWdEsafVKcY72-YLT-2M73RUwFsNTa3SUkhio7apxA7XbDUw6SxiEyMvo0JBYDrZACfGZoaytMBlH3ZG05klEZJ-Dd5Nnpn1COL_8ppktBaiohOUMBNKua61_TZG0wT34Sez9uQV5eb2bNAnee2bEDEB_Fch58INp06vbnOe15G5rBww9jcihjIHwBva790rCdU6SQO1u9h6YBfsNDXxnk-bO8Nx1J8NNdU1Qnr7Phkf69vzzj8Q6CzmxqaxYLkZRKh5ORXocsw%3D) [**CHIP IN $25 TO TAKE BACK CONGRESS**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7ea2401a2f0c4a96897d843fa1a005ac&_e=5JtemDpBgmYZu3BDdRMJCnCVxc5Kigqv0Xvv991T-2KrHTv-XWzLSxXUHORYoGsUcvRaHKVwIE4lgaXu4tdxCqnv6p2iy52kSoi6jgBb5UWuuZQRjb5aVJ-vF3nImKbzVaEG06BiKUfgyVTiQbahYTXXrQye9WIqPvqi6k3maq9LfIXsAN63qFYDyUge_QF0JrHd09RRVXbwN2hG19vlrAfYCVQr3fGlIOLLZdTQrMWsZPw-fvjkoH_a44soBjwFAebn1IkZKSZbANDDDR480cRLun69a37xVGthvPsLgbFXGh1d3HqlmtN7vwfidutxyLV1ED91Hxln_dnZuZGoM6DCjRT18CEoHX7N2EUZ-JbZNyCtxB_bmF_9yr-uRjW2B0BAN9Hqoir-gXRXZCQPvxDKtMiyu4fv6sDYg6F4wQA%3D) [**CHIP IN $50 TO TAKE BACK CONGRESS**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7ea2401a2f0c4a96897d843fa1a005ac&_e=5JtemDpBgmYZu3BDdRMJCnCVxc5Kigqv0Xvv991T-2KrHTv-XWzLSxXUHORYoGsUcvRaHKVwIE4lgaXu4tdxCgKhIZmnj9R88xgKRZz8Q6X1OI6B268y_mg1ZBNblSDGejPGgkq-wZyEunLNMRzR96pcdYz-0dCutGLOgcM9Zg1j-EyoDDy9KS1PYbnWDcplGE0pgbIFPlFUDLSnJoXajhN10wwIsQG5tYznVsN_du5cdOARXyazm9ArsumotvXC_cMD2jRBSnOTpan7daQMNw4MzmpVzwd-3tZ0VOSVlcaYm0UldBSioUrhcGJ1az9JezJ1t3rVy4zuSCTln9FQ5X6BlDH-p6eIcgUsacbYJJW4JlLVGcnnZ_wsKC9ZaCLx7KPHWuWe4n5rFLQ1TctPfRntPpj4WOjZiNFHurIhn_8%3D) Thank you, Greg Pence |

body:

Yesterday evening, The Associated Press declared me the winner of the crowded, 8-way Democratic Primary to succeed Congresswoman Nita Lowey in the U.S. House of Representatives.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbak6B9CHAsq_7MusNDJuuV-4-SAIdoXVhZY2wewT5eEPY2UQ1CpixRCliFU2ubHaUPTv4bBUSdCXciepkn26jvhe_Fw1QAxQiYBCoRV9blzN_mQ-luC36grKP2VbCh9MaP_c8DbwA-xPJMeIFPzRiwCvcY2z90wpC9vRDjrnB0igs7Q2DlkMrwrMJ2PvWoJbFbzCWiny66krGSW87Jh_RvU54iZ24RASW8u8PZfw36zWLPNEEjGBpwkO5kTPrTbEsc-xVkpxcDG06gADoUdaxlI1n-vaxcn3lFYdrzDW2xg/33h/S61V4hQtT26bT8esabz96w/h1/E9I_kgz9iW9pCS45I-PHT0pZ6T4xsVv9D39p84tw0u8)

You don’t get our level of support without a grassroots movement behind you. Friend, I’m proud that this campaign is powered by people like you. **_[Will you chip in today for our general election campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbak6B9CHAsq_7MusNDJuuV-4-SAIdoXVhZY2wewT5eA0w_Vmv6N1NsFEADPW_hygCVAy_YUufP27Fk62bUhFJun-i5gUfjhIi50WMRch1rLuf9VwCXiQE-YRwl9-eOTZZeS-dXisBxzdMSoQ8UfN9xAeumUZDuw4hQtl4vnF-yu8iEQiCgFBAhczrES_Yj6ukjCjo8Gc42hiA84TVYpTs-h9gfTNAi4BXiwaNV5NUOTMBooQj5Y4EGuYc9Fk4OUiAPV34y4ou9d5KFpvg5h8YNvl4KdfpWtI7Z1pOBj_vUQ/33h/S61V4hQtT26bT8esabz96w/h2/nnlFL22BTD-KsoP8aMEvjsPBOcKPTsLU-Y-oOEoHL9U)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbak6B9CHAsq_7MusNDJuuV-4-SAIdoXVhZY2wewT5eIELOx3ZzmZhGmGDamv1k0eisSNzTcUH78tskxgh7fbfh-ndeeINszCepzXkrVcj6jd9vXJ2bOmLd0OQvJ017HmMvvlHN9SyFtp_HDuh0qO5H4_4wjx6ly73I1zpIQd5wvi0PSezmeAO4PJSNoA39VuTyEF8Bmqf8Vvpob1wQATxutAhQ_O4_4ZMneB4FpNlWY40julcw6tPnaedHsc7j5LgrDdsMVvrkVNR1_NTVhMZhDrSeBWIOUqIN0hYMMICwg/33h/S61V4hQtT26bT8esabz96w/h3/dxjX1CV_lF9Fy-QQIXWppC8EOEqrANGzcz1ZjYPpEkE)
One year ago this week, I sat at the dinner table calling my friends and asking them to support me in this historic bid for Congress. I was nervous. Nervous that I wouldn’t be able to convince them of what we could achieve if we put our minds to it. Nervous that they wouldn’t think I could win. Quickly, however, something exciting happened. My friends told me that they believed in me, and that if running for Congress under such tough circumstances made sense to me, they would support me all the way. Then I started calling people I had never met, and they believed in me too. Stepping out on faith didn’t feel so lonely anymore.

This campaign was never about me. It has always been about the idea that government has never worked for everyone, and that it can and must do more if we are to meet our greatest challenges. This campaign is about the idea that we can save the planet from climate catastrophe and ensure a livable future for generations to come through a Green New Deal. It’s about the idea that in the richest nation in the history of the world, we can ensure health care for everyone--and I do mean everyone. It’s about the idea that all children, regardless of the circumstances of their birth, are entitled to a quality, public education. And, in a civilized society, we can finally deliver racial justice for communities of color through dismantling systemic racism.
**_[That’s why I need your help in the general election. Can you pitch in something today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbak6B9CHAsq_7MusNDJuuV-4-SAIdoXVhZY2wewT5eLsaXE6gFx3rlyqdVxuvYuUD94f_IAMXg-otpmj6k86iJwzk-4x3a-6YLTlsfm8yw8HcCxkiwbJaEnycGV9ty17WlhluVCfW8_Sup-fHbkOY9vnooPuCx1XPQzIJQo21Zn3lrZat7P-MwPkwuvgdIlx0sKSJkKP4q5GrVvHvJINoh2m698W7Y23NyofTjYfli_NgqUxgEhQpfSPI4JLOVS3Jdr_q8ybL7U7orrG2QCZiLWvHSq_Y3ZyibXSWTpcwOg/33h/S61V4hQtT26bT8esabz96w/h4/tEVSDyq88BtFhxzjsh3iGypxGnR17cFDWLAc2ZZRF7M)_** My Republican opponent has said that she got into this race because she opposes the right of women to have an abortion. She has also stated her opposition to the Black Lives Matter movement, marriage equality, and Obamacare. For good measure, she supports Donald Trump’s horrific border wall with Mexico.
This country can’t afford more people like Donald Trump in power, and New York’s 17th Congressional District deserves better.
We need to keep raising money so that we can educate all voters--not just Democrats, but Independents and Republicans-- in New York’s 17th Congressional District about what’s at stake in this election. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us start our general election campaign strong?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbak6B9CHAsq_7MusNDJuuV-4-SAIdoXVhZY2wewT5eHPGL2ymGkohtkklL5Vrv4dVduLiJogrp6qeAi_nY4URrKFYSQkv_zKEizDTkLvgnEn9ppYSYqnLvyhse4R9I4wpzXYNo8JjfAipAK67wJN9a0pslLXkqX74ZyVCEWDILjff5ZNCDp3FKQFE8yWvPyE-RU1DllpbMITbL5zHotg-AaRhnjJ1nWyKOTaaaTgEDWxTch6INvhBKyDWwmRuZr1hOsvV858NwUhE4vTr4LqdmDbS2KeElrhPvbOL5JPkNg/33h/S61V4hQtT26bT8esabz96w/h5/r_fCuu-kEcom6d7SnyufZaydB_Js6Fp9ydRJVNZF8LA)_**
Thank you again for everything. None of this would be possible without supporters like you. Our decisive victory further energizes me to continue this fight through November so that we can get to Congress and deliver real change for the American people.
With deepest gratitude, Mondaire

clean_body: Yesterday evening, The Associated Press declared me the winner of the crowded, 8-way Democratic Primary to succeed Congresswoman Nita Lowey in the U.S. House of Representatives. | | | Friend, Yesterday evening, The Associated Press declared me the winner of the crowded, 8-way Democratic Primary to succeed Congresswoman Nita Lowey in the U.S. House of Representatives. We won with 42 percent of the vote, nearly three times as much as the second-place finisher, who spent $5 million. We defied conventional wisdom and proved the naysayers wrong. You don’t get our level of support without a grassroots movement behind you. Friend, I’m proud that this campaign is powered by people like you. One year ago this week, I sat at the dinner table calling my friends and asking them to support me in this historic bid for Congress. I was nervous. Nervous that I wouldn’t be able to convince them of what we could achieve if we put our minds to it. Nervous that they wouldn’t think I could win. Quickly, however, something exciting happened. My friends told me that they believed in me, and that if running for Congress under such tough circumstances made sense to me, they would support me all the way. Then I started calling people I had never met, and they believed in me too. Stepping out on faith didn’t feel so lonely anymore. This campaign was never about me. It has always been about the idea that government has never worked for everyone, and that it can and must do more if we are to meet our greatest challenges. This campaign is about the idea that we can save the planet from climate catastrophe and ensure a livable future for generations to come through a Green New Deal. It’s about the idea that in the richest nation in the history of the world, we can ensure health care for everyone--and I do mean everyone. It’s about the idea that all children, regardless of the circumstances of their birth, are entitled to a quality, public education. And, in a civilized society, we can finally deliver racial justice for communities of color through dismantling systemic racism. My Republican opponent has said that she got into this race because she opposes the right of women to have an abortion. She has also stated her opposition to the Black Lives Matter movement, marriage equality, and Obamacare. For good measure, she supports Donald Trump’s horrific border wall with Mexico. This country can’t afford more people like Donald Trump in power, and New York’s 17th Congressional District deserves better. We need to keep raising money so that we can educate all voters--not just Democrats, but Independents and Republicans-- in New York’s 17th Congressional District about what’s at stake in this election. Thank you again for everything. None of this would be possible without supporters like you. Our decisive victory further energizes me to continue this fight through November so that we can get to Congress and deliver real change for the American people. body:
It's time for another Super Saturday!Are you looking to make a difference for your Indiana Republican team?There are several ways you can make | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/make-your-saturday-super?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| Hoosier Republicans,

It's time for another Super Saturday!

Are you looking to make a difference for your Indiana Republican team? There are several ways you can make a **_BIG_ **difference to help elect strong Republicans in 2020 -- and one simple way is participating in our Super Saturday events!

**Our next Super Saturday is this Saturday, July 18th. **We'll be talking with voters about the election in November, and the reasons why it's critical we support our Republican team up and down the ballot,_**starting with President Trump, Governor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Crouch!**_ Todd Rokita, our Republican attorney general candidate, was just nominated last Friday-- so what better way to keep this momentum going than getting out and talking with Hoosier voters? ** **
[**\-- > Click here to sign up for our Super Saturday event <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8b79338ab7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Sign up](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e3c4d4dd45&e=1acd9bb3d6), and a member of our team will reach out to you to sign you up for a shift (or two). They'll provide you with all the information you need to have a successful day representing your Indiana Republican Party!

Your help will be the difference-maker this year!** Let's continue to keep the momentum going, so we can ensure Republican success in November!**

-Your Indiana Republican Party

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. * * *
**It’s official, friend** **\-- Troy Nehls will be our opponent in the general election.** TX-22 dealt with a long, ugly Republican primary that saw a member of the Bush dynasty defeated in Texas for the first time in almost 50 years simply because he didn’t run as far to the right as possible. And much to the consternation of the national Republican party, the Republican nominee for TX-22 is **a former cop who was fired for destroying evidence and lied about it on a sworn affidavit.** He ran his primary by operating racist lines of attack for Facebook likes, attacking a survivor of sex trafficking, and actively questioning the severity of the coronavirus pandemic as his own employees got sick. **The first 60 hours since our official general election opponent was announced are critical, friend. ** [_**We need to make sure we have the money in our campaign fund to immediately start getting the word out on the truth about Troy Nehls. Anything you can give will help us inform TX-22 voters on the dangers of our opponent’s candidacy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18270415/222868609/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.15_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzhiMjJhNi1jY2M2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FidrRZdt1KEjU1Nj8TvL3PMyWX2HxwmTr80k7Gs293k=) | [Reject his message ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18270418/222868610/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.15_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzhiMjJhNi1jY2M2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FidrRZdt1KEjU1Nj8TvL3PMyWX2HxwmTr80k7Gs293k=)
---

**Troy Nehls has proven that he can’t and won’t fight for the families of our district.**
His seeming natural talent for _not_ raising grassroots money means that his campaign will have to be bought and paid for by special interests. And his extremist campaign platform and message serves no one but himself and any dark money groups willing to pay to play.
**What Texas families need is a proven champion for our community.** We need someone with a clear-eyed vision for the issues our families face every day, and whose common-sense solutions will finally make Washington work for the people. From expanding access to affordable healthcare to ensuring that we build a lasting road to economic recovery in the months and years ahead of this crisis, Sri is committed to fighting for our district -- _and he’s building the wide coalition and grassroots network to prove it._
We need Sri’s lifetime of public service representing us in Congress, friend. We need his leadership and moral clarity, because this election and the issues at stake for us are too important to be left unresolved --_or worse, ignored by someone like Troy Nehls._
[_**If you agree, please make a contribution today. We’re officially in the general election -- and we plan to prove to TX-22 and the rest of the country that in November, victory will be ours.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18270419/222868613/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.15_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzhiMjJhNi1jY2M2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FidrRZdt1KEjU1Nj8TvL3PMyWX2HxwmTr80k7Gs293k=)

name: Red New Hampshire
subject: this tax day, help us stop the Democrat Income Tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDY1ODk0NzYzNTI0NzkwMTUxJmM9bzh6MCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzExODkxNzkmZD1nOGE1bDZo.t-mfCNu-FJi3Dqr0kDiZUY_BD4J-URlIFBxbsJRX2wg)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Derek, Today is Tax Day 2020, and Democrats in New Hampshire have been chomping at the bit to implement an Income Tax. They've already submitted multiple Income Tax bills that Governor Chris Sununu had to veto in order to protect the New Hampshire Advantage and keep you from having to file and pay a State Income Tax. With less than four months to go until Election Day 2020, we need to pull out all the stops to [defeat the **Democrat Income Tax.**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDY1ODk0NzYzNTI0NzkwMTUxJmM9bzh6MCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzExODkxODImZD1oMW85bTRv.XLwQNiqltZQ-1c96rBgp-ftATB2cM0bfoBNrMcKqbaY)****
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDY1ODk0NzYzNTI0NzkwMTUxJmM9bzh6MCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzExODkxODgmZD1pOGM2ZDN2.hKsayv1XV7gic878ryK286DiCZSJcs6i5XCoo7y_IoM)
---
| |

| Democrats will spread any amount of misinformation to claim otherwise, but they can't hide from their pro-Income Tax record that they've developed in Concord - and a vote for any Democrat on the ballot is a vote for an Income Tax in New Hampshire, [and they must be defeated.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDY1ODk0NzYzNTI0NzkwMTUxJmM9bzh6MCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzExODkxOTQmZD13NHg5dDhm.3bsgS0zrs6c_itqg6IDzyPJXDYl6PfpFX4RUwzbSgdg) The Granite State prides itself on being **Income and Sales Tax free.** We can't let the Democrats get away with their plans to implement either in our state. Friend -- Donald Trump is en route to Georgia.

He's not coming with a plan to contain the pandemic.

He's not coming to grieve with the thousands of families who have lost loved ones.

_We don't even know if he'll wear a mask._

**No, Trump is coming to Georgia to distract and deflect from his failure, to insult his political adversaries, and to prop up Jon Ossoff's opponent.**

Amidst widespread disease and unemployment, Trump's trip to Georgia to tout his "record" strikes most of us as bizarre.

_But, remember: Trump's "favorite Senator," David Perdue, is Jon Ossoff's opponent. And Perdue is in DEEP trouble for trading medical stocks in January and February while publicly downplaying the threat of this pandemic._

**The same day the Senate received a classified COVID-19 briefing, Perdue bought stock in a company that makes PPE for doctors and nurses.**

_Since then, Perdue and Trump have downplayed the pandemic or ignored it altogether._

Friend, an effective response to this deadly virus requires leadership and competence -- not narcissism, denialism, and self-dealing.

Jon Ossoff will make health policy based on medical expertise, not personal self-interest.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: BREAKING: Joe Biden's climate plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
He proved us right.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, In April, when I endorsed Joe Biden on Earth Day, I said I was convinced beyond the shadow of a doubt that he would increase his commitment to climate action and make it a major driving force in his administration. He proved me right. This week, Joe Biden released his climate policy and vision for America, focused on rebuilding our economy with good-paying union jobs and a central commitment to environmental justice. This is about building a better America -- a better world -- for all of us. 2020 is our last, best chance to defeat climate change.**Joe Biden's decision to embrace our vision for a clean energy economy is proof that climate is a winning campaign issue, one I'm running on in my reelection.[Donate $5 or more to support my campaign in Washington state today.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9749?t=5&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9750?t=6&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9751?t=7&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9752?t=8&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9753?t=9&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9754?t=10&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9749?t=11&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)
---
We are the first generation to feel the sting of the climate crisis and the last that can do anything about it. That's why this moment is so important. The vision being championed by Joe Biden is work we've long championed, so we know it is what we need to succeed -- and we have to. It's imperative that the next president lead a national mobilization to defeat climate change.
The fight to defeat climate change is really one that's about courage. Courage to take on big fights, to make big changes, and to give people a vision of a hopeful future again. That's what I've fought for my entire life, and I'll keep fighting every day here in Washington state as our governor, especially ahead of this November's election.
**We need to commit to the challenge of defeating climate change, and it starts at home. That's why I'm running for reelection in Washington, to keep up that fight.[Will you donate $5 or more to my reelection and support the fight against climate change right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9749?t=12&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9749?t=13&akid=8103%2E868730%2E-LYpsH)
---

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: It’s time to get to work!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend,
The votes have been counted, all counties have completed their canvassing of absentee ballots, and our victory has been solidified. Western New Yorkers made their voices heard for strong conservative leadership, and now we have officially won the Special Election for New York's 27th Congressional District.
I want to thank our voters for their trust and would like to reiterate my commitment to each of you that I will fight for you, and our region in Congress. This was a long campaign, and there certainly have been many changes and obstacles, but my mission to fight alongside our President for Western New York has not changed.
To all the volunteers and supporters, thank you for your hard work and dedication. This victory would not have been possible without every one of you - this is a big win, but our work is not done yet!
[**We have 111 days until November 3rd, and we have to make sure that we stay strong so that we not only keep this seat in strong Republican hands but that we ensure a new Republican Majority in Congress for President Trump.**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/xjQIQapk2IFcI49hvD0763gA/EhL916bszfS2k8KuZPWMrg)
I am looking forward to getting officially sworn into Congress - it's time to get to work!
Best,
Chris Jacobs
