subject: Beyond Defunding the Police: Democratic Leaders Condone Crime
body:
Democrats are moving a step beyond national debate over defunding the police, questioning whether crime is a bad thing at all. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ffa518a70e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Beyond Defunding the Police: Democratic Leaders Condone Crime**

“Democrats are moving a step beyond national debate over defunding the police, questioning whether crime is a bad thing at all. During the past month, three leading Democrats have all issued statements blessing criminal acts,” Anna Giaritelli writes for the _Washington Examiner_.

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was asked about the destruction of statues nationwide when a reporter pressed her on one such toppling in Baltimore.”

“People will do what they do,” Pelosi said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4bf2eb9ac1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump said Tuesday that he has signed legislation that would impose mandatory sanctions on individuals and businesses that assist China in restricting Hong Kong’s autonomy . . . The president said he took the actions to ‘hold China accountable for its oppressive actions,’” Morgan Chalfant reports for [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a1dafcd81&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A major teachers union in Los Angeles says the district can’t re-open schools until there is a ‘moratorium’ on charter schools. Oh, and until police are defunded. Oh, and until there is ‘Medicare for all.’ Oh, and until there’s a wealth tax and a federal bailout, too,” Joseph Curl writes in [_The Daily Wire_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0106fdce4d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Last month, President Trump took action to defend US servicemen and women from an illegitimate investigation by the International Criminal Court . . . President Trump refuses to stand by as [our troops] are illegitimately targeted by international organizations seeking to harm the United States,” National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien writes in the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=023b77a3fb&e=3ee4985eea "https://nypost.com/2020/07/13/trump-is-standing-up-for-us-sovereignty-against-the-global-swamp/")._
---
|

name: Joe Biden
subject: Asking you to read my latest newsletter, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Writing to you today with a few updates from the campaign. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c5670/1822752377/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/")
---
_Below is Joe Biden 's newsletter for July 15, 2020. Please submit questions and feedback [here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c566f/1822752377/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/newsletter-form?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")_
Hi Peter,

I hope you and your family are doing well. Writing to you today with a few updates from the campaign.

Across the country, COVID-19 cases are rising, and this country is in need of clear and steady leadership.

My team has been hard at work here doing what we can: developing policies that will help Americans in this crisis and beyond and uplifting the essential workers who are keeping us safe.

And ultimately, we're building a campaign that can beat Donald Trump and restore the leadership Americans deserve in the Oval Office.

So listen, I hope in this time of uncertainty, this campaign can serve as a place for you to stay informed and feel empowered to play a leadership role in the battle for the soul of this nation.

Every email you read, volunteer action you take, and donation you make are an act of fighting back and fighting alongside me. So thank you, Peter. Let's get into it.

_Joe_
**Campaign Updates**

I've spent the past few weeks developing an economic recovery agenda that will meet this moment, create high-paying jobs that provide a choice to join a union, and work for _all_ Americans.

Yesterday, I announced a plan to create millions of good-paying, union jobs that will solve our jobs crisis while addressing our existential climate crisis. You can read more about our plan for a clean energy future here: [https://joebiden.com/Clean-Energy/](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c566e/1822752377/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/Clean-Energy/")

I'm no stranger to inheriting an economic recession, and I know that it takes more than just building back up to where we were -- _we need to build back better than before._

**I 'm introducing a comprehensive plan to do just that, with the following focal points:**
1. Mobilize American manufacturing and innovation to ensure that the future is made in America, and in all of America. **Read more here:** [https://joebiden.com/madeinamerica/](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c566d/1822752377/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/madeinamerica/")

2. Mobilize American ingenuity to build a modern infrastructure and an equitable, clean energy future.

3. Mobilize American talent and heart to build a 21st-century caregiving and education workforce, which will help ease the burden of care for working parents, especially women.

4. Mobilize across the board to advance racial equity in America.

[You can read more about my Build Back Better plan by clicking here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c566c/1822752377/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/Build-Back-Better/")

And you can watch a video my team put together with a little help from some familiar faces here: [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c566b/1822752377/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/JoeBiden/status/1282468533838860288") | [LEARN MORE >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c566c/1822752377/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/Build-Back-Better/")
---
Another thing we talk about a lot here, Peter, is fundraising.

And that's because, thanks to all of you, we're getting pretty darn good at it.

Online grassroots donations make up 97% of our campaign's contributions, and that's allowed us to surpass Trump and the RNC's fundraising two months in a row.

[**Now, Peter, to make it three months in a row, I 'm going to need all of my supporters to pitch in their first donation of July to help us get there. If you're able, will you contribute?**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
**Biden Donor Record**

**Name:** Peter Willis
**Biden Donor:** No. Not yet!
**July 2020 Donor:** No. Not yet!
**Suggested action today:** [Chip in $5 as your first July donation >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

| [$100 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&express_lane=true")

| [$250 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=250&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&express_lane=true")
---
| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
**What I 'm Reading This Week**

["Republicans Committed to Florida Convention Despite Coronavirus Surge" \-- The New York Times](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c5663/1822752377/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/07/13/us/elections/biden-vs-trump.html?action=click&module=Top%20Stories&pgtype=Homepage#link-58c788d")
I'm glad that the Democratic National Convention will still be anchored in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, and I am proud that our party will be prioritizing the health and safety of all of our candidates, supporters, and the staff that makes events like these even possible by conducting much of the official proceedings remotely. I strongly encourage the RNC to do the same and not put any of their own supporters or workers in Florida at risk.

["This Isn't Sustainable for Working Parents" \-- The Atlantic](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c5662/1822752377/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.theatlantic.com/family/archive/2020/07/working-parents-careers-school-childcare/613936/")
As someone who has been a single parent, this article really hit home for me. The pandemic has made raising a child as a working parent, an already difficult task, even more challenging as childcare options are limited, and some parents must take on the task, in partnership with educators, of helping their children learn remotely. I was lucky enough to have a lot of help from my family as a young single father, but I've never lost that commitment to helping families like mine, and in a Biden Administration, I'm committed to making sure no one, especially working parents, gets left behind.
**Hey Joe!**

_People send me questions every day. I like to take time to answer a couple of them._

**Question from Denise in Atlanta, GA: I taught teenagers for 33 years and I think we all know that children are our greatest hope. What will a Biden presidency do to ensure a robust and equal education for every child in America? PS. Our next Secretary of Education should be a TEACHER!**
First of all Denise, thank you for your years of teaching. As you know, my wife is an educator, and I have nothing but the highest respect for teachers. I know how hard your jobs are, and this country owes you a great deal of gratitude.

As President, I plan to build an education system that starts investing in our children at birth and helps every student get some education beyond a high school diploma, whether a certification, associate's degree, or bachelor's degree. Systemic racism is persistent across our institutions today -- including in our education system -- and must be addressed. No child's educational opportunity should be determined by their zip code, parents' income, race, or disability. We need to invest in our public schools to eliminate the funding gap between majority white and majority non-white districts, and rich and poor districts. We also need to improve diversity among teachers.

And yes, Denise, I couldn't agree with you more -- our next Secretary of Education should be a public school teacher. Four years of Betsy DeVos is more than enough. We need a Secretary of Education who understands what our students and teachers are facing each day.

**Question from Maria in Las Vegas, NV: I 'm dying to know who you are going to choose to pick as your Vice President! Any hints?**
You'll have to stay tuned to find out! But in the meantime, you can [sign up here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c5661/1822752377/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.07.15_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") to be one of the first to find out.
**Spread the Faith**

As all of us are painfully aware, the coronavirus is on an upswing across many parts of our country. But I am so incredibly proud and impressed by the way the people of this country have responded.

We know it's working. On Sunday, for the first time in four months, New York City reported zero deaths from coronavirus. That's a team effort.

Peter, as we feel beaten down and overwhelmed by the virus, remember that it is possible to defeat it. That eventually, we will be able to regain control of our lives. And that there is hope for those currently fighting outbreaks in their states.

People coming together to help one another during tough times is the cornerstone of this country.

[**One group continuing to struggle in this new normal are restaurant workers. So, if you are able to, please consider making a donation to the Restaurant Workers ' Community Foundation's Emergency Relief Fund:** ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c5660/1822752377/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.restaurantworkerscf.org/np/clients/restaurantworkerscf/donation.jsp?campaign=2&forwardedFromSecureDomain=1&test=true") | [DONATE >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c5660/1822752377/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.restaurantworkerscf.org/np/clients/restaurantworkerscf/donation.jsp?campaign=2&forwardedFromSecureDomain=1&test=true")
---
**What 's Coming**

**Did you know we 've compiled a campaign playlist?** [We have a new "Get up, Stand up!" Spotify playlist you can listen to by clicking here >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c565f/1822752377/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0fPI0tOtlULK4mHKMqYsvM?si=NzvkNPuAR-O27330S-4wDA") [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c565f/1822752377/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0fPI0tOtlULK4mHKMqYsvM?si=NzvkNPuAR-O27330S-4wDA") **Have you signed up to volunteer in your area yet?** We have localized virtual trainings and actions to join every day. [Sign up here on our Action Center and our organizing team will be in touch >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfdc/1cd0ac28/8da09893/357c565e/1822752377/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/take-action/")

**I 'm making calls every week to donors to thank them, and let me tell you, a lot of my friends want to join me.** Barack Obama joined me for a few phone calls recently, and Elizabeth Warren and I will be at it again soon. Want to be on a call sheet?

[**Chip in below and you 're automatically entered for a chance to be selected. clean_body: Writing to you today with a few updates from the campaign. | | "" Below is Joe Biden 's newsletter for July 15, 2020. Please submit questions and feedback "" Hi Peter, I hope you and your family are doing well. Writing to you today with a few updates from the campaign. Across the country, COVID-19 cases are rising, and this country is in need of clear and steady leadership. My team has been hard at work here doing what we can: developing policies that will help Americans in this crisis and beyond and uplifting the essential workers who are keeping us safe. And ultimately, we're building a campaign that can beat Donald Trump and restore the leadership Americans deserve in the Oval Office. So listen, I hope in this time of uncertainty, this campaign can serve as a place for you to stay informed and feel empowered to play a leadership role in the battle for the soul of this nation. Every email you read, volunteer action you take, and donation you make are an act of fighting back and fighting alongside me. So thank you, Peter. Let's get into it. Joe Campaign Updates I've spent the past few weeks developing an economic recovery agenda that will meet this moment, create high-paying jobs that provide a choice to join a union, and work for all Americans. Yesterday, I announced a plan to create millions of good-paying, union jobs that will solve our jobs crisis while addressing our existential climate crisis. You can read more about our plan for a clean energy future here: "" I'm no stranger to inheriting an economic recession, and I know that it takes more than just building back up to where we were -- we need to build back better than before. I 'm introducing a comprehensive plan to do just that, with the following focal points: 1. Mobilize American manufacturing and innovation to ensure that the future is made in America, and in all of America. Read more here: "" 2. Mobilize American ingenuity to build a modern infrastructure and an equitable, clean energy future. 3. Mobilize American talent and heart to build a 21st-century caregiving and education workforce, which will help ease the burden of care for working parents, especially women. 4. Mobilize across the board to advance racial equity in America. "" And you can watch a video my team put together with a little help from some familiar faces here: "" | "" Another thing we talk about a lot here, Peter, is fundraising. And that's because, thanks to all of you, we're getting pretty darn good at it. Online grassroots donations make up 97% of our campaign's contributions, and that's allowed us to surpass Trump and the RNC's fundraising two months in a row. "" Biden Donor Record Name: Peter Willis Biden Donor: No. Not yet! July 2020 Donor: No. Not yet! Suggested action today: "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" What I 'm Reading This Week "" I'm glad that the Democratic National Convention will still be anchored in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, and I am proud that our party will be prioritizing the health and safety of all of our candidates, supporters, and the staff that makes events like these even possible by conducting much of the official proceedings remotely. I strongly encourage the RNC to do the same and not put any of their own supporters or workers in Florida at risk. "" As someone who has been a single parent, this article really hit home for me. The pandemic has made raising a child as a working parent, an already difficult task, even more challenging as childcare options are limited, and some parents must take on the task, in partnership with educators, of helping their children learn remotely. I was lucky enough to have a lot of help from my family as a young single father, but I've never lost that commitment to helping families like mine, and in a Biden Administration, I'm committed to making sure no one, especially working parents, gets left behind. Hey Joe! People send me questions every day. I like to take time to answer a couple of them. Question from Denise in Atlanta, GA: I taught teenagers for 33 years and I think we all know that children are our greatest hope. What will a Biden presidency do to ensure a robust and equal education for every child in America? PS. Our next Secretary of Education should be a TEACHER! First of all Denise, thank you for your years of teaching. As you know, my wife is an educator, and I have nothing but the highest respect for teachers. I know how hard your jobs are, and this country owes you a great deal of gratitude. As President, I plan to build an education system that starts investing in our children at birth and helps every student get some education beyond a high school diploma, whether a certification, associate's degree, or bachelor's degree. Systemic racism is persistent across our institutions today -- including in our education system -- and must be addressed. No child's educational opportunity should be determined by their zip code, parents' income, race, or disability. We need to invest in our public schools to eliminate the funding gap between majority white and majority non-white districts, and rich and poor districts. We also need to improve diversity among teachers. And yes, Denise, I couldn't agree with you more -- our next Secretary of Education should be a public school teacher. Four years of Betsy DeVos is more than enough. We need a Secretary of Education who understands what our students and teachers are facing each day. Question from Maria in Las Vegas, NV: I 'm dying to know who you are going to choose to pick as your Vice President! Any hints? You'll have to stay tuned to find out! But in the meantime, you can "" to be one of the first to find out. Spread the Faith As all of us are painfully aware, the coronavirus is on an upswing across many parts of our country. But I am so incredibly proud and impressed by the way the people of this country have responded. We know it's working. On Sunday, for the first time in four months, New York City reported zero deaths from coronavirus. That's a team effort. Peter, as we feel beaten down and overwhelmed by the virus, remember that it is possible to defeat it. That eventually, we will be able to regain control of our lives. And that there is hope for those currently fighting outbreaks in their states. People coming together to help one another during tough times is the cornerstone of this country. "" | "" What 's Coming Did you know we 've compiled a campaign playlist? "" "" Have you signed up to volunteer in your area yet? We have localized virtual trainings and actions to join every day. "" I 'm making calls every week to donors to thank them, and let me tell you, a lot of my friends want to join me. Barack Obama joined me for a few phone calls recently, and Elizabeth Warren and I will be at it again soon. Want to be on a call sheet? "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" That's all I've got for today, Peter. Thank you so much for your support, for taking the time to read this and for believing in this campaign. Every time you donate or talk to your friends about what we're fighting for, you're helping to build the framework that will defeat Donald Trump. So thank you, Peter. Take care, Joe | "" | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Let's help elect Sara Gideon, unseat Susan Collins, and flip one of the key seats Democrats need to take back the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Sara Gideon is ready to keep serving Maine as a U.S. Senator. But the polls show that this race is going to be competitive, and Susan Collins is a longtime incumbent who won't be easy to beat. That's | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84f56/142862750/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
The people of Maine deserve a senator who puts them first.

They deserve a senator who fights to make our country work for everyone, not just the special interests.

They deserve a senator who isn't afraid to speak truth to power.

They deserve Sara Gideon, the Democratic nominee for this November -- not their current GOP senator, Susan Collins.

**Let's help elect Sara Gideon, unseat Susan Collins, and flip one of the key seats Democrats need to take back the Senate.**

**[If making a donation makes sense for you right now, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to support Sara Gideon and Warren Democrats so we can win big in Maine and across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84f58/142862750/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxMUZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzE1X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT11F_EGR_END_E_20200715_V1S3_P")**

So, let's talk about Susan Collins.

In 2018, when she cast one of the deciding votes to give Brett Kavanaugh a lifetime seat on the Supreme Court, she said that he would uphold precedents that protect abortion rights.

How did that work out? Well, last month, he voted to overturn one of those precedents -- and now, he's got Roe v. Wade in his sights.

Earlier this year, when Susan Collins voted against convicting Donald Trump in the Senate, she said that he didn't need to be held accountable because he'd already "learned his lesson."

Yeah, sure, he's learned his lesson -- he's learned there are enough Republican enablers in the Senate who will let him do anything he wants. He's learned that lesson so well that last week, he rewarded Roger Stone with a presidential pardon for committing crimes to protect Trump.

Meanwhile, as Speaker of Maine's House of Representatives, Sara Gideon has been clear-eyed about the corruption that rewards the wealthy and well-connected, and committed to getting results for the people she serves.

Sara Gideon has helped protect health care for Mainers with pre-existing conditions, fight the opioid crisis by expanding treatment and prevention while pledging to hold giant drug companies accountable for causing this crisis, and stood up for reproductive justice.

**Now, Sara Gideon is ready to keep serving Maine as a U.S. Senator. But the polls show that this race is going to be competitive, and Susan Collins is a longtime incumbent who won't be easy to beat.**

**[We need to fight side by side as a grassroots movement to send Sara Gideon to Washington. Can you make a donation right now to support her campaign and Democrats like her up and down the ticket? Anything you can contribute would make a real difference in this powerfully important race.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84f58/142862750/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxMUZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzE1X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT11F_EGR_END_E_20200715_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84f58/142862750/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxMUZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzE1X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT11F_EGR_END_E_20200715_V1S3_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84fbe/142862750/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84fa1/142862750/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84fa0/142862750/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84fa3/142862750/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84fa2/142862750/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e5/45c30650/1ccebac01/66e84fa5/142862750/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

Sara Gideon has helped protect health care for Mainers with pre-existing conditions, fight the opioid crisis by expanding treatment and prevention while pledging to hold giant drug companies accountable for causing this crisis, and stood up for reproductive justice. Now, Sara Gideon is ready to keep serving Maine as a U.S. Senator. But the polls show that this race is going to be competitive, and Susan Collins is a longtime incumbent who won't be easy to beat. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:

Peter,
Last night Sara Gideon won the Democrat primary to be my opponent this November. But something else also happened, something that has never occurred in the history of our democracy... she was given $4 million dollars for winning.
_**Let me explain.**_
In 2018, when Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh was up for confirmation, several Far Left groups got together to try and buy my vote -- if I voted for Justice Kavanaugh they would award my future opponent a fund that is now valued at $4 million dollars. If I voted against him, the money would be refunded and just disappear.
My vote can not and will not ever be bought -- something you know full well.
My vote that day in 2018 put a bullseye on my campaign, and has now put my race at a $4 million dollar disadvantage.
**I voted to confirm Brett Kavanaugh, and it 's a vote I stand by. I voted for fairness, due process, and the rule of law. But right now I need to know if you will stand by me.**
**_Yes, Susan! You 've got my support!_

body:
|
---
**Brutal News ->-> Dr. Anthony Fauci says he "can't guarantee" in-person voting in November will be safe.** [So we're collecting 5,000 Signatures within 24 hours to demand Congress Pass a Universal Vote-by-Mail option.](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsE/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS") [**Digital Petition:** Please, can you add your name to our petition to Congress?](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsF/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS") | [Add My Name >>](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsC/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")
---

* * *
[](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsD/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")
The coronavirus has brought on a voting rights crisis.

No one should have to choose between their health and casting a ballot.

But many Republicans REFUSE to expand Vote-by-Mail options. It's ridiculous.

And Donald Trump is TRASHING mail-in ballots constantly:
[](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsA/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")
[**_So Let America Vote launched the Secure, Accessible, Fair Election (SAFE) Democracy Project. It 's a 50-state grassroots campaign to force Congress to provide more election preparedness funding, implement a no-excuse Vote-by-Mail option for all upcoming elections, and add additional safeguards to guarantee safe and sanitary in-person voting._**](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsB/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")

Now we need you to join us.

[**We need to move quickly on this, can you sign right now on our petition to expand Vote-by-Mail options?**](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsO/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")
[Add My Name >>](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsP/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")
---
[**_https://secure.letamericavote.org/Demand-VBM_**](https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/m/5e18656c/2e69d856/335b6e70/6ebb9c33/1361590438/VEsHBQ/?g= "https://secure.letamericavote.org/page/s/demand-VBM?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.07.15_B2_VBM_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")

Always with you.

-_Let America Vote_

body:

| | Hey Peter, MJ's Texas Finance Director here.

It's my job to make sure the campaign has the resources we need to get MJ's message out to undecided voters. With **34%** of Texans undecided about who they're supporting on Election Day, we're racing against Sen. Cornyn to get them on our side. That's a big job, and we can't do it without you. **[Help get MJ's message out to undecided voters.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489010f/7f51f7bc/41e6aa01/4ef6682f/3164444590/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200715.2nd__1719__&amount=10")**

We've got a huge team of grassroots donors, but now that we're facing Sen. Cornyn head-on, it's even MORE important that we're able to reach our goals and plan ahead for what's to come.

One big way you can help is by setting up a recurring donation, which allows us to make important investments knowing we can count on your donation in the months ahead. **[Start your recurring donation _today_.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489010f/7f51f7bc/41e6aa01/4ef6682c/3164444590/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200715.2nd__1719__&amount=10&recurring=true")** We've got just over 100 days until the November election, so we need to buckle down if we want to defeat Sen. Cornyn. Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director
MJ for Texas

**[P.S. Can't make a recurring donation? Donate $15 right now to help us start the general election strong!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489010f/7f51f7bc/41e6aa01/4ef66822/3164444590/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200715.2nd__1719__&amount=15")**

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489010f/7f51f7bc/41e6aa01/4ef6682c/3164444590/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200715.2nd__1719__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Staying Positive
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/staying-positive?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# All too often professional politicians seek to tear each other down, trying to exploit any weaknesses they find in their opponents. This does not help anyone and causes voters to turn away, dismissing a process they find covered in mud.

Kansans do not want a senator who spends all of their time engaging in mudslinging in an attempt to win. This won’t help Kansas now and will not help Kansas long term. This is why I am engaging in a positive campaign. In fact, I am the only Senate candidate doing this.

This election is too important for mudslinging. We need to focus on ways to grow Kansas, help our rural communities, preserve our state-of-the-art transportation system and protect things like our pro-life and pro-Second Amendment values. We need to be focused on the issues and a robust discussion of ways to grow Kansas and help We The People.

Mudslinging now not only distracts from talking about ways to help Kansas, it boosts the Democrats and Barbara Bollier. This election is far too important and we need to make sure we are a united Republican Party this fall.

I am running a positive, issues focused campaign because I am just a Kansan who has stepped up and wants to help my neighbors. I am a businessman and a former Kansas City Chief who wants to go to Washington, help our state and then come home. That is why I believe in term limits and the concept of citizen legislators.

This is why I ask for your support. Remember, early voting has started in Kansas. [Click here](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=cb2384035a&e=41f8e27552) to find your polling place.

Dave

_P.S. – As we enter the final weeks, I can always use your help to get my positive message out to all Kansans. Please click on the logo below to find out how you can help._
# _[](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=6e354f038c&e=41f8e27552)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Jay Inslee won't back down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Governor Jay Inslee is showing what real leadership looks like.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8098%2E868730%2EHqupBU) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8098%2E868730%2EHqupBU)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, This is an unprecedented moment in American history: We are facing crises in public health, our economy, and trust in law enforcement. Donald Trump has proven not just to be a failure at addressing them -- he's made them worse. That's why I am reaching out to ask you to join me in supporting my friend Jay Inslee. Here's why:**During this chaotic and uncertain time, Jay has set a national example of thoughtful, steady, progressive leadership during multiple crises -- that's a sharp contrast to the chaos from the other Washington.** Look, we know that Trump's not going to stop tweeting. And we know he won't let up on his hateful agenda. That's why it's so important that we have the back of leaders like Jay Inslee who prove to us every day how important it is to have strong leadership in states across America. **Jay's one of only four Democratic governorships we have to defend this November, and he needs our help to fight back against attacks -- from the GOP in Washington, D.C. to the GOP in Washington state.[He has a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight on Friday: Donate $5 or more right now to support Jay Inslee.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9646?t=5&akid=8098%2E868730%2EHqupBU)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9647?t=6&akid=8098%2E868730%2EHqupBU)

It's clear that this nation needs real leadership. And Jay has shown time and time again that he is the steady, thoughtful leader for the people of his state. Over the past few months, he's made Washingtonians' health and safety a top priority, following science and data to flatten the curve in Washington state and save countless lives. He's heard the voices of citizens taking to the streets to seek justice and equity.
And under Governor Inslee's leadership over the last eight years, Washington state has led the country by putting into place progressive policies like paid family and medical leave, mandated paid sick days, expanding health care for nearly 800,000 Washingtonians, the highest minimum wage of any state, and the most progressive voting rights laws in America.
When you compare this to the nonsense coming out of the White House, it's all the more clear why Jay's leadership matters.
That's why I have Jay's back, and I hope you'll join me.
**There has never been a time when strong, thoughtful leadership was more necessary than right now, and it is critical that Governor Inslee has the resources he needs to win reelection this fall.[Donate $5 or more to support Governor Jay Inslee's reelection campaign right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9646?t=12&akid=8098%2E868730%2EHqupBU)**
Thanks,
Beto

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH LIVE: President Trump speaks in Georgia at 3:10 p.m. ET
body:
About 90 years ago, builders put up the Empire State Building in just 13 months. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a92f09c48f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 15, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE: President Trump speaks in Georgia at 3:10 p.m. ET**

**About 90 years ago,** builders put up the Empire State Building in just 13 months. Today, even the simplest construction projects can drag on for years, if not decades.

**This afternoon,** President Trump is in Atlanta to discuss his new update to the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA). This action marks the first time the NEPA will be comprehensively reformed in more than 40 years.

**This NEPA update** will shorten average environmental review time from an unacceptable four-and-a-half years to just two years—ensuring that safe, modern, and resilient infrastructure can be built in record time while continuing to protect America’s environmental heritage.

🎬 [WATCH LIVE: President Trump speaks from Atlanta at 3:10 p.m. ET](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96fb016c32&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ:**[Costly government delays hurt taxpayers and risk public safety](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8358319f4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump: China took ‘hundreds of billions’ a year from America**

**President Trump** signed both the Hong Kong Autonomy Act and a related executive order last night, which will hold China and others accountable for their efforts to stifle the freedom and safety of the people of Hong Kong.

**“We’ve all watched** what happened. Not a good situation,” President Trump said during a press conference from the White House Rose Garden. “Their freedom has been taken away. Their rights have been taken away. And with it, goes Hong Kong.”

**China has violated** its longstanding obligations on the issue, reversing Hong Kong’s status as a free society and endangering its innocent residents. These actions are a blatant violation of China’s promise to Great Britain that it would keep Hong Kong free and open until the year 2047.

🎬 [President Trump announces new actions against China](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b371ad112&e=3ee4985eea)

**American lives** and livelihoods are at risk, as well: 1,300 American businesses and 85,000 American citizens currently reside in Hong Kong.

**Last night’s actions** give the President and his Administration powerful new tools to hold responsible any individuals and entities involved in extinguishing Hong Kong’s freedom. The executive order, for example, ends U.S. preferential treatment for Hong Kong unless and until the Chinese Communist Party takes appropriate corrective steps.

**“No administration** has been tougher on China than this administration,” President Trump said. He’s right—from day one, these important actions have included:
* Placing hundreds of billions of dollars in tariffs on Chinese goods to confront unfair trade practices

* Launching a Section 301 investigation into China’s intellectual property abuses

* Protecting U.S. national security by placing tariffs on steel from abroad

* Stopping Federal retirement investment in problematic Chinese companies

* Halting U.S. funding to the World Health Organization in response to its dangerous bias toward China on Coronavirus

**“China has taken** out hundreds of billions of dollars a year from our country,” President Trump said. “And we rebuilt China. I give them all the credit in the world. I don’t give the credit for the people that used to stand here [at the White House], because they allowed this to happen.”

[Watch: No leader has been tougher on China](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65b71cfc40&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ IT** : [President Trump's Executive Order on Hong Kong Normalization](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=820abe4e53&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump participates in a briefing from law enforcement officials** | July 15, 2020
---
|

name: Mike Espy
subject: It’s Mike Espy — the son
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18273733/222958575/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTdlNWQ1Zi1mMmM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uww_xXoG8LVGLwD6VutCwUACOjMsOqGLNSH0XV57KTY=&emci=0fa11b90-f1c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=e97e5d5f-f2c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Hey, It's Mike Espy — the son. Were you fooled? No matter the reason, I'm glad you opened up my email, because now you get a chance to read me bragging on my dad, Mike Espy, a little. He has been working non-stop to become our next U.S. Senator in Mississippi, and I can personally vouch that he’s operating on another level. My dad has been doing virtual listening tours, interviews, and last weekend he was on our Volunteer Launch call helping volunteers learn how to text. He went right from the gym to join the call. That's dedication! But that's who my dad is when he has his sights set on something. **He has always told me that dreams don’t come from magic, but from sweat, determination, and hard work.** Those words helped push me to be a top college prospect, a professional football player, and now I get to instill that into some of our state’s top athletes as I help them train throughout the year. name: Team Joe
subject: Peter, don't pass up this special opportunity.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We wanted to extend the opportunity for you to get on this list for another 24 hours. |
---
Peter,

As you've heard, Joe Biden plans to pick his running mate before next month's Democratic National Convention. It's an exciting time for all of us as we lock in the ticket that is going to win this election and make Donald Trump a one-term president.

In May, we emailed our supporters the special opportunity to add their name to be one of the first to learn about Joe's running mate pick when he's ready to share the news. And over 120,000 Team Joe supporters have already done so!

But, with so many new supporters joining the team since June, over 2.6 million to be exact, we wanted to extend the opportunity for you to get on this list for another 24 hours -- so don't miss this chance!

[Add your name right now to be one of the first to know who will be Joe Biden's vice presidential pick »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57c0/4074377533/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-nonopeners_RS") | **OFFER EXTENDED: BE THE FIRST TO KNOW ABOUT JOE 'S VP PICK!** **Supporter:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57c0/4074377533/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-nonopeners_RS") **Signed to be the first to know about Joe 's pick?** No, not yet!
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME HERE >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57c0/4074377533/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-nonopeners_RS")
---
Remember, Joe has pledged to select a female running mate, who would become the first woman to serve as Vice President in American history.

So you won't just be one of the first to know about one piece of this election, you'll be the first to learn about a major moment in our country's history.

**Peter, don 't pass up this opportunity again. Here's the link one more time to get on this exclusive list:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/first-to-know-vp](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57c0/4074377533/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-nonopeners_RS")

Thanks for being a special part of the team,

_Team Joe_

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57bb/4074377533/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57ba/4074377533/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57b9/4074377533/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57b8/4074377533/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57b7/4074377533/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57b6/4074377533/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57b9/4074377533/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57b5/4074377533/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57b8/4074377533/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfde/1cd0ac28/8defcbfd/357c57b4/4074377533/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Calling out ICE's COVID-19 response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
ICE detention centers have seen a spike in COVID-19 cases, jeopardizing the health of the people in ICE custody.

To make matters worse, there are new reports that ICE staff are disinfecting facilities with hazardous chemicals. For detained people, the use of harsh disinfectants in such close proximity has resulted in itchy rashes, bloody noses, burning eyes, fainting, and coughing fits.

ICE's COVID-19 response is an outright disgrace, not to mention inhumane. That's why Congress must do everything in its power to hold ICE accountable for its actions.

Demand Congress open an investigation into ICE's COVID-19 response | SIGN YOUR NAME >>

It's unsurprising that COVID-19 has spread quickly through ICE detention facilities, given that detainees are packed so closely together with poor air circulation. Using hazardous disinfectants, however, is just another cruel decision in ICE's long list of shameful judgment calls.

Will you stand up for the people in ICE custody by demanding that Congress open an investigation into ICE's COVID-19 response?

Thanks for taking action,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/JYAWiQ5pRjImPl94xFCdhZ1ZKVxYk61A9N1YNikfhDk=/fvLP6xwUJKxOTqihHaQtu66K7B0yHtK_t9cdrFGFkqg=.

To make matters worse, there are new reports that ICE staff are disinfecting facilities with hazardous chemicals. For detained people, the use of harsh disinfectants in such close proximity has resulted in itchy rashes, bloody noses, burning eyes, fainting, and coughing fits. ICE's COVID-19 response is an outright disgrace, not to mention inhumane. That's why Congress must do everything in its power to hold ICE accountable for its actions. Demand Congress open an investigation into ICE's COVID-19 response | SIGN YOUR NAME >> It's unsurprising that COVID-19 has spread quickly through ICE detention facilities, given that detainees are packed so closely together with poor air circulation. Using hazardous disinfectants, however, is just another cruel decision in ICE's long list of shameful judgment calls. Will you stand up for the people in ICE custody by demanding that Congress open an investigation into ICE's COVID-19 response? Thanks for taking action, -- Linda Sánchez | Paid for by Stand with Sánchez | Stand with Sánchez 415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1 Washington DC 20003 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. p.p1 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px 'Helvetica Neue'}

subject: Which will it be?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Hagerty vs. James:
|
---

| | **FEC DEADLINE:
[_Chip in to reach our $25,000 goal ->_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0cc/18d6a294/4c869eee/26d7f5e7/3410965564/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200715?refcode=jme200715_a_other&refcode2=107423")** | | | [CHIP IN NOW -> ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0cc/18d6a294/4c869eee/26d7f5e7/3410965564/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200715?refcode=jme200715_a_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Friends, with the FEC deadline only two days away, this is an important time to remember what this fight is all about.
In November, you will determine who we will send to the Senate to represent Tennesseans.
It will either be Bill Hagerty:
* Who promises to follow **Marsha Backburn 's** footsteps as another rubber stamp for the Washington agenda that has disproportionately hurt Tennessee.
* Whose supporters include **Mitch McConnell, Tom Cotton,** and **Kellyanne Conway**.
* Who jumped to the front of the line to land a **multi-million dollar sweetheart loan** for his campaign when Tennessee small businesses worried how they would survive this pandemic.
* Who promised to put the interests of the wealthy and well-connected first, and was rewarded with **thousands of dollars from corporate PACs** for doing so.

Or it will be James:
* Who's fighting to increase access to health care in the wake of unprecedented rural hospital closures.
* Who's fighting to protect and expand **equal rights, voting rights** , and **reproductive rights**.
* Who's fighting for **workers** and **small businesses** and to strengthen the economy.
* Who's taking **ZERO corporate PAC money** \-- our campaign is 100% grassroots-operated.

[_**We know what the stakes are. Now, we need to take action to ensure Tennesseans get the leadership they deserve. If you can, chip in before the FEC deadline to help reach our $25,000 goal so we have the resources to send James to the Senate this November.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0cc/18d6a294/4c869eee/26d7f5e7/3410965564/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200715?refcode=jme200715_a_other&refcode2=107423")
Thanks,
Team Mackler

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: The next, most critical part of our work:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

Because of our volunteers, we've been able to make over a million calls to
Texans in key districts in the past two months alone.

And now that the runoff is over, we can start the most critical part of
our work: winning a Democratic majority in the State House and stopping
Trump forever in November.

In order to do that, we're going to need a lot more volunteer power —
starting right now. Can we count on you to join us for a phone bank this
upcoming week?

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42652?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1001&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Virtual Voter Contact Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42652?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1002&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Thursday, July 16, 7pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42652?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1003&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42664?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1004&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Virtual Voter Contact Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42664?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1005&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Monday, July 20, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42664?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1006&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34385?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1007&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34385?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1008&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Thursday, July 23, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34385?source=ema20200715-97663&t=1009&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]Get more info or RSVP »

Even if November seems far away, it's imperative that we show up starting
now. We must reach out to Texas voters as often as we can before November
3rd to remind them of their role in winning a Democratic majority in the
State House and in stopping Trump's second term.

So much is at stake and we need to do everything we can in order to make
sure that things work out the way we need them to in November. That's why
we're reaching out to you right now about making calls.

We hope you'll make the time to join us in the coming week to call folks.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42672?refcode=ema20200715-97663&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1010&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L ]But if you can't, please pitch in $3 or anything you can afford to
help Powered by People reach and register thousands of Democratic voters.

Thanks for all that you do — it's critical,
important work.

In solidarity,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1011&akid=97663%2E444211%2ERFAz-L

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Bill Olson
subject: The socialists are evil
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to be YOUR champion in Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

I am a Christian. As a Christian, we are taught to love, even your enemies.

That is why I don't understand the blind hatred the Democrats seem to have these days- against our country, against our history, against our very citizens!

Consider the actions of the Dems just in the last few weeks:

-Tearing down historical statues, even when it's illegal to do so. In Portland, mobs tore down statues of George Washington and Thomas Jefferson; in Richmond, Governor "Radical Ralph" Northam has torn down many statues along the city's famous Monument Ave. The DNC even came out swinging against historic Mt. Rushmore! It clearly doesn't matter if they are confederate statues or not; it's America they hate!

-Abolishing the police, depriving citizens of needed protection against violent crime. Look at what Joe Biden has now embraced:

It's clear Joe Biden's far left advisers are starting to change his stance on policing in America.

During an interview Wednesday with leftist publication This Now, Biden said the police are over militarized, have "become the enemy" and said funding should "absolutely" be reallocated elsewhere. In other words, he's advocating for the defunding of law enforcement as crime across the country continues to skyrocket.

-Depriving us of our Constitutionally-guaranteed rights, including our freedom of speech and freedom to worship.

The U.S. Constitution is also being tested in unprecedented ways, with religious leaders from Mississippi to Kentucky to San Diego County suing their governments, asserting that they are being treated differently from businesses that can remain open, such as supermarkets and liquor stores.

What is most disturbing is that the Supreme Court has backed California's restrictions on Freedom of Worship.

-Condoning violence by mobs.

House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers"—in the wake of George Floyd's death.

The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life."

Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen."

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

It is now clear that the Democrats, including my opponent Darren Soto, have been swept away by extremism, with the most fringe Stalinist parts of their base now driving the party's agenda. These ain't Kennedy's Democrats- they have more in common with Chairman Mao of the Chinese Communists!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

I fought for our country in Iraq and Afghanistan. My sons and I have served our country for decades- and when you take the oath to defend the Constitution, it has no expiration date!

I will defend our country and our Constitution against the Democrats' anti-American extremism. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw
?

Our district now knows that there is a better way forward- one which does not include overthrowing the Constitution and the entire American system- as Ilhan Omar now advocates:

Rep. Ilhan Omar says America is a giant “system of oppression” needing an immediate “dismantling” far beyond current calls for criminal justice reform.

“We can’t stop at criminal justice reform or policing reform,” she said during an outdoor press conference. “We are not merely fighting to tear down the systems of oppression in the criminal justice system. We are fighting to tear down systems of oppression that exist in housing, in education, in health care, in employment, [and] in the air we breathe.”

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

It's hard to believe, but this kind of Communist Revolution is now what the Dems, led by AOC and Ilhan Omar, advocate. That's why it's important to stand up for America- right now!

Now, I'm not a slick fundraiser or polished politician. I'm don't have Pelosi's Swampy millions, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, defend America and support the President!

I need your help to stand up for the Constitution and against Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw
Florida is SO important for the Republicans. It's now the President's hme state, with many swing districts like mine!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyBgtCS9O_6OuRU&b=iusewQ0VPiGzpuKVfDK5gw
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
Hello friends,
I’m on the road today in Colorado meeting with local leaders to hear what they need to fully tackle and recover from COVID-19.
It’s more clear than ever that we need a national strategy to keep people safe and boost our economy, but that’s not happening in Washington.
Mitch McConnell and other extreme Republicans won’t budge on critical progress—like expanded unemployment insurance and a national Health Force.
That’s why I wanted to take the time to quickly follow up with you.
If we want leaders in Washington who will fight for progress and put people first, then we need to help Democrats win up and down the ballot this year. And we need your help to do it.
My finance team announced earlier this week that if we can raise $10,000 by midnight tonight, we’ll be in a good position to block Republican attacks in Colorado – but with less than 6 hours until our deadline, we’re still $2,120 short of our goal! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-july-2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_071520_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
I know it’s a tough financial time for many, but here’s my ask: if you’re in a position to chip in, can you rush a quick contribution of $10 before midnight to help Democrats like me keep fighting for progress in Washington? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-july-2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_071520_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
Here's the secure link to donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-july-2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_071520_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-july-2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_071520_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
Thanks,
Michael
Sent from my iPhone
Thank you for being a part of Michael’s re-election campaign!
Sending emails is a crucial way to keep supporters like you updated on what Michael is doing in Colorado and Washington D.C. to fight for progress in a purple state. Plus, this campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you! Will you chip in today to join Michael in the fight for a better tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
DONATE TO ELECT MICHAEL BENNET >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse – thank you so much. We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for your support.

clean_body: [] Hello friends, I’m on the road today in Colorado meeting with local leaders to hear what they need to fully tackle and recover from COVID-19. It’s more clear than ever that we need a national strategy to keep people safe and boost our economy, but that’s not happening in Washington. Mitch McConnell and other extreme Republicans won’t budge on critical progress—like expanded unemployment insurance and a national Health Force. That’s why I wanted to take the time to quickly follow up with you. If we want leaders in Washington who will fight for progress and put people first, then we need to help Democrats win up and down the ballot this year. And we need your help to do it. My finance team announced earlier this week that if we can raise $10,000 by midnight tonight, we’ll be in a good position to block Republican attacks in Colorado – but with less than 6 hours until our deadline, we’re still $2,120 short of our goal! [] I know it’s a tough financial time for many, but here’s my ask: if you’re in a position to chip in, can you rush a quick contribution of $10 before midnight to help Democrats like me keep fighting for progress in Washington? [] Here's the secure link to donate: [] Thanks, Michael Sent from my iPhone Thank you for being a part of Michael’s re-election campaign! Sending emails is a crucial way to keep supporters like you updated on what Michael is doing in Colorado and Washington D.C. to fight for progress in a purple state. Plus, this campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you! Will you chip in today to join Michael in the fight for a better tomorrow? [] DONATE TO ELECT MICHAEL BENNET >> [] Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse – thank you so much. We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for your support. Paid for by Bennet for Colorado Contributions or gifts to Bennet for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Socialism on the march & I am the counter-punch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight against Nancy Pelosi and for America, every chance I get. I will fight for the rule of law!
I can't believe there are Democrat mayors and governors who are excusing the violent rioters- and, in fact, encouraging them!
It's not just one or two. The entire Democrat caucus in Congress approves of, and encourages, the violent rioters!
How do we know this?
_**House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers"** —in the wake of George Floyd's death._
_The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life."_
_Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen."_
_No House Democrats voted in favor of Steube's resolution. Rep. Justin Amash (I., Mich.) voted with Republicans to support the measure._
[What do I need to convince you of the hopelessness of the Democrats](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q)? They literally cannot bring themselves to vote against the targeting of police officers, violence or rioting.
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q)
---

**_My opponent, G.K. Butterfield, the Deputy Democrat Whip, voted in favor of violent riots - riots that destroyed black neighborhoods, murdered innocent people, and targeted police. _**

_In an impassioned press conference Sunday night, Atlanta Mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms issued a full-throated call for citizens to stop "shooting each other up on our streets," after an 8-year-old girl was shot and killed on the Fourth of July near a Wendy's that has become a flashpoint of anti-police Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests in the city._

_Bottoms, a Democrat who is considered a potential running mate for Joe Biden, made the remarks as she fought through tears -- and the nation endured a new bout of urban carnage. Sixty-three people were injured and 17 killed in Chicago, including two children, over the weekend; and in New York City, 44 were hurt and at least six killed._

Dozens of violent shootings. An eight year old girl shot and killed. THAT is what G.K. Butterfield supports. It's what he voted for.

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q)

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi in her support for violent rioters! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iP6f8YDOHpNxmng&b=MUT8b5KylC4Tqc8yNVxp4Q) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCxsnJzM7CxM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCxsnJzM7CxM)
